name: Apple Chunk Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease a 13 x 9 baking pan.
2. In a large bowl, mix sliced apples, sugar, cinnamon, oil, eggs, flour, baking soda, salt, and vanilla until combined.
3. Fold in chopped nuts.
4. Pour batter into prepared pan.
5. Bake for 35-40 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
6. Allow cake to cool completely in the pan for 10 minutes before dusting with powdered sugar or frosting with cream cheese frosting.
7. This cake is best if baked one day ahead. If freezing apples, do not mix them with other ingredients until ready to make the cake. Defrost only enough to mix.
8. For cream cheese frosting: Combine powdered sugar, cream cheese, and milk in a bowl until smooth. Adjust consistency as needed.
